description_long: This is a classic football with a spherical shape, featuring a traditional black and white pattern composed of pentagonal and hexagonal panels. The surface displays visible stitching lines where the panels are joined, giving it a slightly textured appearance. The black pentagons are evenly distributed among the white hexagons, creating a recognizable and iconic design. The ball appears to be made of synthetic leather or similar material, with a slightly matte finish and subtle seams. There are no visible logos, text, or branding on the surface. The football looks clean and well-maintained, with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A classic black and white football with pentagonal and hexagonal panels, visible stitching, and a clean, well-maintained surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing a centered black pentagonal panel surrounded by white hexagons and visible stitching.
description_view_1: Opposite view with a similar arrangement, highlighting another black pentagon at the center and the even distribution of panels.
description_view_2: Side view nearly identical to view 0, with the same panel pattern and stitching details visible.
description_view_3: Side view nearly identical to view 1, showing the same panel configuration and clean surface.
